description: Auto-run tests after code changes in src/ or test/ directories

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read file_path; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '(src/|test/|__tests__)'; then if [ -f package.json ]; then npm test 2>&1 | head -30; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then cargo test 2>&1 | head -30; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then go test ./... 2>&1 | head -30; elif [ -f requirements.txt ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then pytest 2>&1 | head -30; fi; fi; }
